inputs.label: Initial Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Wet basis moisture content of the material before drying

businessContext_i18n.en: Wet basis moisture content of the material before drying
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurutma öncesi malzemenin yaş bazda nem içeriği
businessContext_i18n.de: Feuchtigkeitsgehalt des Materials vor dem Trocknen (Nassbasis)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Teneur en humidité sur base humide du matériau avant séchage
businessContext_i18n.es: Contenido de humedad en base húmeda del material antes del secado

inputs.label: Final Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Target moisture content after drying (wet basis)

businessContext_i18n.en: Target moisture content after drying (wet basis)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurutma sonrası hedef nem içeriği (yaş baz)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Teneur en humidité cible après séchage (base humide)
businessContext_i18n.es: Contenido de humedad objetivo después del secado (base húmeda)

inputs.label: Wet Material Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of wet material to be dried

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of wet material to be dried
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des zu trocknenden nassen Materials
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale du matériau humide à sécher
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total del material húmedo a secar

inputs.label: Drying Rate
inputs.businessContext: Moisture removal capacity of the dryer

businessContext_i18n.en: Moisture removal capacity of the dryer
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité d'élimination de l'humidité du séchoir
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad de eliminación de humedad del secador

inputs.label: Specific Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to evaporate 1 kg of water

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required to evaporate 1 kg of water
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 kg suyu buharlaştırmak için gereken enerji
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie, die benötigt wird, um 1 kg Wasser zu verdampfen

businessContext_i18n.es: Energía necesaria para evaporar 1 kg de agua
